title: 小红帽
meaning: 听从长辈的教导，不要轻信陌生人的话，也不要偏离既定的安全路线。

scenes.title: 妈妈的叮嘱
scenes.description: 温馨的木屋厨房内，阳光透过窗户洒在木桌上。妈妈正细心地为小红帽整理红色的兜帽斗篷，并将装有蛋糕和葡萄酒的篮子递给她。小红帽眼神清澈，充满期待。
scenes.prompt: Little Red Riding Hood: A cute girl aged 6, wearing a bright red hooded cloak and a white dress, holding a small wicker basket. The Wolf: A large grey wolf with shaggy fur, yellow eyes, and a sly expression, standing on two legs. Grandma: An elderly woman with white hair in a bun, wearing a floral nightgown and a headscarf, looking frail but kind., Interior of a cozy wooden kitchen, sunlight streaming through window. Mother adjusting Little Red Riding Hood's red hood. Little Red Riding Hood holding a wicker basket with cake and wine. Warm, safe atmosphere. Classic watercolor style., Close-up shot focusing on the interaction between mother and daughter, soft focus background., Classic storybook illustration style, soft watercolor textures, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting, detailed background elements like forest trees and cottage interiors, suitable for children aged 3-8.
scenes.compositionHint: Close-up shot focusing on the interaction between mother and daughter, soft focus background.
scenes.narration: 从前，有个可爱的小女孩，大家都叫她“小红帽”。有一天，妈妈把小红帽叫到身边，细心地帮她戴好红斗篷，说：“去奶奶家路上要小心，别和陌生人说话哦。”

scenes.title: 森林初遇
scenes.description: 茂密的森林小径上，树木高大，光影斑驳。小红帽蹦蹦跳跳地走着，忽然在路边遇到了一只灰狼。狼站在树后，露出一丝狡黠的笑容，身体微微前倾。
scenes.prompt: Little Red Riding Hood: A cute girl aged 6, wearing a bright red hooded cloak and a white dress, holding a small wicker basket. The Wolf: A large grey wolf with shaggy fur, yellow eyes, and a sly expression, standing on two legs. Grandma: An elderly woman with white hair in a bun, wearing a floral nightgown and a headscarf, looking frail but kind., Forest path with tall trees and dappled sunlight. Little Red Riding Hood walking happily. A large grey wolf hiding behind a tree trunk, smiling slyly at her. Detailed forest foliage., Medium shot showing both characters with distance between them, emphasizing the wolf's hidden position., Classic storybook illustration style, soft watercolor textures, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting, detailed background elements like forest trees and cottage interiors, suitable for children aged 3-8.
scenes.compositionHint: Medium shot showing both characters with distance between them, emphasizing the wolf's hidden position.
scenes.narration: 小红帽走进森林，花儿真香啊！突然，一只大灰狼从树后探出头来，笑眯眯地看着她：“小姑娘，你要去哪里呀？”

scenes.title: 狼的诡计
scenes.description: 林间空地，阳光透过树叶缝隙。狼指着旁边开满鲜花的小路，眼神诱导。小红帽停下脚步，低头看着那些鲜艳的花朵，显得天真无邪。
scenes.prompt: Little Red Riding Hood: A cute girl aged 6, wearing a bright red hooded cloak and a white dress, holding a small wicker basket. The Wolf: A large grey wolf with shaggy fur, yellow eyes, and a sly expression, standing on two legs. Grandma: An elderly woman with white hair in a bun, wearing a floral nightgown and a headscarf, looking frail but kind., Forest clearing with vibrant flowers. The wolf pointing towards a flower path with a tempting gesture. Little Red Riding Hood looking down at the flowers, distracted. Bright colors contrasting with the green forest., Over-the-shoulder view from the wolf's perspective, highlighting the flowers and the girl's attention., Classic storybook illustration style, soft watercolor textures, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting, detailed background elements like forest trees and cottage interiors, suitable for children aged 3-8.
scenes.compositionHint: Over-the-shoulder view from the wolf's perspective, highlighting the flowers and the girl's attention.
scenes.narration: 狼骗她说：“你看旁边的花多美呀，去采一些给奶奶吧，她会很高兴的。”小红帽心想：“是啊，奶奶一定会喜欢鲜花的。”于是她离开了大路。

scenes.title: 奔向奶奶家
scenes.description: 画面分为两部分暗示时间流逝。狼以极快的速度奔跑在林间，身影模糊，表现出急切和阴谋感。周围树木飞速后退，营造紧张氛围。
scenes.prompt: Little Red Riding Hood: A cute girl aged 6, wearing a bright red hooded cloak and a white dress, holding a small wicker basket. The Wolf: A large grey wolf with shaggy fur, yellow eyes, and a sly expression, standing on two legs. Grandma: An elderly woman with white hair in a bun, wearing a floral nightgown and a headscarf, looking frail but kind., The grey wolf running fast through the forest, motion blur to show speed, determined and malicious expression. Trees blurring past. Dynamic action shot, tense atmosphere., Low angle shot following the wolf, emphasizing his speed and urgency., Classic storybook illustration style, soft watercolor textures, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting, detailed background elements like forest trees and cottage interiors, suitable for children aged 3-8.
scenes.compositionHint: Low angle shot following the wolf, emphasizing his speed and urgency.
scenes.narration: 趁小红帽在花丛中小憩时，狼撒开四条腿，飞快地跑向奶奶家。他心里打着坏主意，恨不得马上吃掉奶奶。

scenes.title: 伪装与潜入
scenes.description: 奶奶家的卧室，光线昏暗压抑。狼穿着奶奶的睡衣，戴着奶奶的眼镜和头巾，坐在床上，只露出尖尖的鼻子和耳朵，眼神凶狠地盯着门口。
scenes.prompt: Little Red Riding Hood: A cute girl aged 6, wearing a bright red hooded cloak and a white dress, holding a small wicker basket. The Wolf: A large grey wolf with shaggy fur, yellow eyes, and a sly expression, standing on two legs. Grandma: An elderly woman with white hair in a bun, wearing a floral nightgown and a headscarf, looking frail but kind., Dark bedroom interior. The wolf wearing grandma's floral nightgown and glasses, sitting in bed. Only sharp nose and ears visible under the headscarf. Sinister look towards the door. Shadowy lighting., Framed through the doorway, creating a sense of intrusion and danger., Classic storybook illustration style, soft watercolor textures, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting, detailed background elements like forest trees and cottage interiors, suitable for children aged 3-8.
scenes.compositionHint: Framed through the doorway, creating a sense of intrusion and danger.
scenes.narration: 狼敲了敲门，装出粗粗的声音：“是我呀，小红帽，我来看你了。”他爬进被窝，把自己伪装成奶奶的样子，等待着猎物的上门。

scenes.title: 奇怪的奶奶
scenes.description: 床边特写。小红帽站在床边，疑惑地看着床上的人。狼虽然化了妆，但依然能看出巨大的体型差异。小红帽伸手去摸狼的脸，表情从好奇转为惊讶。
scenes.prompt: Little Red Riding Hood: A cute girl aged 6, wearing a bright red hooded cloak and a white dress, holding a small wicker basket. The Wolf: A large grey wolf with shaggy fur, yellow eyes, and a sly expression, standing on two legs. Grandma: An elderly woman with white hair in a bun, wearing a floral nightgown and a headscarf, looking frail but kind., Little Red Riding Hood standing by the bed, looking confused. Close up of the wolf's face partially covered by headscarf, revealing large teeth and grey fur. Girl reaching out to touch him., Two-shot composition focusing on the facial expressions and the physical differences., Classic storybook illustration style, soft watercolor textures, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting, detailed background elements like forest trees and cottage interiors, suitable for children aged 3-8.
scenes.compositionHint: Two-shot composition focusing on the facial expressions and the physical differences.
scenes.narration: 小红帽走近床前，觉得今天的奶奶有点奇怪：“奶奶，你的耳朵怎么这么大呀？”狼说：“为了更好听你说话呀。”

scenes.title: 暴露与危机
scenes.description: 高潮场景。狼猛地掀开被子跳起来，张开血盆大口，露出锋利的牙齿，气势汹汹。小红帽吓得后退，手中的篮子掉落，画面充满动感与惊悚感。
scenes.prompt: Little Red Riding Hood: A cute girl aged 6, wearing a bright red hooded cloak and a white dress, holding a small wicker basket. The Wolf: A large grey wolf with shaggy fur, yellow eyes, and a sly expression, standing on two legs. Grandma: An elderly woman with white hair in a bun, wearing a floral nightgown and a headscarf, looking frail but kind., The wolf jumping out of bed, roaring with wide open mouth showing sharp teeth. Little Red Riding Hood backing away in fear, basket falling. Dramatic lighting, high tension, dynamic pose., Wide shot capturing the sudden movement and the fear on the girl's face., Classic storybook illustration style, soft watercolor textures, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting, detailed background elements like forest trees and cottage interiors, suitable for children aged 3-8.
scenes.compositionHint: Wide shot capturing the sudden movement and the fear on the girl's face.
scenes.narration: “可是奶奶，你的眼睛怎么这么大呀？”“为了更好看你呀！”“可是奶奶，你的嘴巴怎么这么可怕呀？”“为了更好吃掉你呀！”说完，狼就扑了上来。

scenes.title: 猎人救援
scenes.description: 森林小屋外，猎人拿着枪冲进来。屋内，猎人剪开狼的肚子（或正在制服狼），奶奶安然无恙地从柜子里走出来，脸上带着劫后余生的微笑。小红帽抱着猎人的腿哭泣。
scenes.prompt: Little Red Riding Hood: A cute girl aged 6, wearing a bright red hooded cloak and a white dress, holding a small wicker basket. The Wolf: A large grey wolf with shaggy fur, yellow eyes, and a sly expression, standing on two legs. Grandma: An elderly woman with white hair in a bun, wearing a floral nightgown and a headscarf, looking frail but kind., Hunter entering the cottage, aiming his gun. Inside, the wolf is subdued or sleeping heavily. Grandma emerging safely from a closet. Little Red Riding Hood crying in hunter's arms. Resolution scene., Group composition showing all characters reacting to the resolution, balanced lighting., Classic storybook illustration style, soft watercolor textures, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting, detailed background elements like forest trees and cottage interiors, suitable for children aged 3-8.
scenes.compositionHint: Group composition showing all characters reacting to the resolution, balanced lighting.
scenes.narration: 幸好，一位猎人路过听到了呼救声。他冲进屋子，赶走了大灰狼。奶奶得救了，小红帽也终于明白不能轻信陌生人的话。

scenes.title: 安全的归途
scenes.description: 阳光明媚的森林出口。小红帽牵着奶奶的手，两人脸上洋溢着轻松的笑容。小红帽回头看了一眼身后的森林，神情变得坚定。篮子里装着采好的鲜花。
scenes.prompt: Little Red Riding Hood: A cute girl aged 6, wearing a bright red hooded cloak and a white dress, holding a small wicker basket. The Wolf: A large grey wolf with shaggy fur, yellow eyes, and a sly expression, standing on two legs. Grandma: An elderly woman with white hair in a bun, wearing a floral nightgown and a headscarf, looking frail but kind., Sunlight at the edge of the forest. Little Red Riding Hood holding Grandma's hand, both smiling safely. Girl looking back at the forest with a determined expression. Basket full of flowers., Frontal view of the two characters walking away, warm and peaceful atmosphere., Classic storybook illustration style, soft watercolor textures, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting, detailed background elements like forest trees and cottage interiors, suitable for children aged 3-8.
scenes.compositionHint: Frontal view of the two characters walking away, warm and peaceful atmosphere.
scenes.narration: 小红帽拉着奶奶的手，一起走出了森林。这次，她再也没有偏离大路，因为她记住了妈妈的叮嘱，也记住了这次惊险的经历。

scenes.title: 寓意总结
scenes.description: 插画风格的教育页。中心是小红帽、奶奶和猎人站在一起，背景是明亮的彩虹和花朵。周围有简单的图标提示：一个禁止手势指向陌生人，一个指南针指向正确的路。
scenes.prompt: Little Red Riding Hood: A cute girl aged 6, wearing a bright red hooded cloak and a white dress, holding a small wicker basket. The Wolf: A large grey wolf with shaggy fur, yellow eyes, and a sly expression, standing on two legs. Grandma: An elderly woman with white hair in a bun, wearing a floral nightgown and a headscarf, looking frail but kind., Educational summary page. Little Red Riding Hood, Grandma, and Hunter standing together under a rainbow. Icons of a stop sign and a compass. Soft, inviting colors. Text space for moral., Centered composition with clear visual hierarchy, leaving space for text overlay if needed., Classic storybook illustration style, soft watercolor textures, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting, detailed background elements like forest trees and cottage interiors, suitable for children aged 3-8.
scenes.compositionHint: Centered composition with clear visual hierarchy, leaving space for text overlay if needed.
scenes.narration: 小朋友们，我们要像小红帽一样，听爸爸妈妈的话，走安全的大路，不跟陌生人走，也不吃陌生人给的东西，这样才能保护自己哦！
